title: ERP Finance Integration Consultant
description:
About Us:

From business process re-engineering to global business expansion for Japanese corporations, ABeam Consulting has served our clients through more than 40 years of growth. With our vision of being the No. 1 global consulting firm from Asia, ABeam Consulting helps our clients take on the challenge of business transformation. With 4,400 consultants in Japan, and 3,100 in overseas offices concentrated in Asia, our 7,500 consultants and global alliance partners provide truly comprehensive services.

Background

A trading company is in the process of implementing a new SAP S/4HANA–based ERP system, scheduled to go live in early February. As part of this transformation, the Philippines entity is addressing challenges related to statutory tax reporting to the Bureau of Internal Revenue (BIR). Currently, there are issues with extracting accounting data from a legacy system and uploading it into SAP Business One due to errors in an existing uploader (UL) tool. In parallel, a new uploader solution aligned with the upcoming SAP S/4HANA ERP system needs to be designed and implemented.

To support both immediate issue resolution and future‑ready solution development, an experienced consultant is required to work closely with business users, local development partners, and the global ERP implementation team.

Responsibilities

The consultant will be responsible for both current‑state stabilization and future solution delivery, including:

  • Conduct current-state analysis of the UL tool and organize business/system requirements for the enhancement.
  • Lead requirement definition and development scheduling with the local development vendor, DynamIQ.
  • Communicate daily with local users (Accounting/Finance), DynamIQ, and provide reporting to the GM (Japanese expat).
  • Work onsite in the Philippines during the initial phase team, who is currently supporting the client locally.
  • The member is expected to stay onsite until the UL tool modification and the MOCA related uploader components are completed.
  • Acting as the primary coordination point with local Accounting/Finance users, development partners, and senior local management.
  • Providing regular status updates and reporting to local management, including Japanese expatriate leadership.
  • Collaborating closely with the SAP S/4HANA global implementation team to ensure alignment with the new ERP (MOCA).
  • Working onsite in the Philippines during the initial phase to support requirement clarification, development kick‑off, and issue resolution.
  • Remaining engaged until completion of UL tool enhancements and S/4HANA‑aligned uploader components.

Requirements

  • Strong understanding of end‑to‑end accounting and finance processes
  • Experience working with financial data extraction, transformation, and reporting
  • Exposure to SAP FI or SAP‑based financial systems is preferred but not mandatoryFunctional SAP support will be available from the global ERP team
  • Ability to work independently while coordinating with multiple stakeholders across locations
  • Strong communication and stakeholder management skills, including interaction with senior management
  • Experience working with external development vendors is highly desirable

Working Model

  • Hybrid engagement:Onsite in the Philippines during the initial project phaseRemote work from Singapore thereafter
  • Flexibility to return onsite in the Philippines again if required, depending on project progress and business needs

Why Join Us

At ABeam Consulting, we place a strong emphasis on collaboration, and helping our employees grow and develop their skills, offering a supportive and empowering work environment. With a presence in multiple countries and a diverse range of clients, ABeam Consulting offers an exciting and dynamic workplace for individuals looking to build a career in consulting. ABeam Consulting has also recently joined SAP’s regional strategic partner initiative as their first regional partner in the region and has also been recognized by UiPath as a Diamond Partner in providing RPA solutions. With such accolades, we aim to continue driving enterprise and digital transformation initiatives in order to transform the way people work and communicate in the digital age. In addition, our industry team is working tirelessly in order to bring more solutions to the banking and finance sector.

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description:
ABEAM CONSULTING (SINGAPORE) PTE. LTD.

ABeam Consulting is a global management consulting firm with headquarters in Japan and with more than 4400 professionals in more than 11 countries and serve over 700 clients throughout Asia, the Americas, and Europe, providing business performance consulting services, integrating business strategy, business process design, information technology enablement, outsourcing and organizational performance and program / project management solutions to our clients. 

ABeam retains a powerful base of professional talent coupled with a global reach which we are recruiting top notch resources for. We currently have the following permanent positions:
